label: Bolt
description: Connect to Bolt's partner platform to manage rides, food orders, and scooter data across EU and Africa.

form.title: Connect Bolt
form.subtitle: Paste your Bolt partner API credentials to access rides, food, and scooter data.

methods.label: API Key & Secret
methods.description: Paste your Bolt partner API key and secret from the Bolt Partners developer portal. The fastest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Bolt Partner API Key & Secret

### Steps

1. Log in to the [Bolt Partners Portal](https://partners.bolt.eu).
2. Navigate to **Developers** in the left sidebar.
3. Click **API Keys** (or **Create new API key** if you haven't generated one yet).
4. Give the key a name such as `Anton` and select the appropriate scopes for the data you need (rides, food, scooters).
5. Click **Generate** (or **Create**).
6. Copy the **API Key** and the **API Secret** — the secret is typically shown only once. Store it securely before closing the dialog.
7. Paste both values into the fields below.

### Notes

- If the API Secret is shown only once at creation time, store it in a password manager immediately.
- If you lose the secret, revoke the key and generate a new one from the same **Developers** page.
- API keys are scoped per environment (production vs. sandbox). Make sure you're using the correct environment key.
- Bolt's partner API is region-specific; ensure your account is associated with the correct country/city fleet.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in the Bolt Partners Portal under Developers → API Keys.

fields.name: api_secret
fields.label: API Secret
fields.description: Shown once at key creation. If lost, revoke the key and generate a new one.

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment
fields.description: Select whether to connect to the live production environment or the sandbox for testing.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Region
fields.description: The primary region your Bolt partner account operates in.
